mapper.sql: resource_id, path_schema, query_schema, method, input_schema, output_schema, url, url_ori, tool_add_type, source_content, target_content
mapper.select:
select srept.resource_id as resourceId, srept.input_schema as inputSchema, srept.output_schema as outputSchema, srept.url_ori as urlOri, srept.method as method, srept.path_schema as pathSchema, srept.query_schema as querySchema, srept.url, srep.headers, srep.resource_id as pluginResourceId from ss_res_ext_tool srept left join ss_resource_rel_detail srrd on srept.resource_id=srrd.rel_resource_id left join ss_res_ext_toolkit srep on srrd.resource_id = srep.resource_id where srept.resource_id in
#{item}

SELECT a.resource_id, a.resource_code, a.system_code, a.resource_source_pk_id, a.resource_biz_type, a.resource_type, a.resource_name, a.resource_desc, a.avatar, a.sample, a.tags, a.resource_version_id, a.host_type, a.catalog_id, a.man_org_id, a.man_user_id, a.index_list, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.com_acct_id, a.resource_status, a.resource_d_verid, a.resource_r_verid, a.auth_status, a.publish_time, a.shelf_time, a.unshelf_time, a.publish_portal, b.resource_id, b.path_schema, b.query_schema, b.method, b.input_schema, b.output_schema, b.url, b.url_ori FROM ss_resource a LEFT JOIN ss_res_ext_tool b ON a.resource_id = b.resource_id WHERE a.resource_biz_type = 'TOOL' AND a.resource_id IN
#{item}
